Short CV

Ceyda ÖZTÜRK AKDENİZ graduated from the Nursing Department of 19 Mayıs University in 2016. She completed her Master’s degree in Psychiatric Nursing at 19 Mayıs University in 2019. In 2025, she received her PhD in Psychiatric Nursing from Istanbul Medeniyet University. She then started working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Nursing at the Faculty of Health Sciences, Üsküdar University.
